x-enumDescriptions.Add-On: An additional feature or component that enhances the functionality of a product.
x-enumDescriptions.Auxiliary: A supplementary product or service that supports the primary product.
x-enumDescriptions.Casual Named User: A type of user license that allows for occasional or infrequent use of a product.
x-enumDescriptions.Configuration: A specific setup or arrangement of a product's features or components.
x-enumDescriptions.Enterprise: A product or service designed for large-scale or enterprise-level use.
x-enumDescriptions.Machine Based: A product or service that is licensed or used on a machine or device.
x-enumDescriptions.Migration Path: A product or service that helps customers transition from one product to another.
x-enumDescriptions.Named User: A type of user license that allows for regular or frequent use of a product by a specific individual.
x-enumDescriptions.Offer: A product or service that is being promoted or offered as a special deal.
x-enumDescriptions.Package: A collection of products or services that are bundled together for sale.
x-enumDescriptions.Service: A product or service that provides support or assistance to customers.
x-enumDescriptions.Shareable: A product or service that can be shared among multiple users or devices.
x-enumDescriptions.Single Add-On: A single additional feature or component that enhances the functionality of a product.
x-enumDescriptions.System: A product or service that is designed to work as a complete system or solution.
x-enumDescriptions.Token-Based: A product or service that uses tokens or other forms of authentication to manage access.
